productDisplayName: Puma Men Black Lo Funpack Shoes
description: Lo Funpack shoes from puma are a combination of bold design and comfortable materials. The graffiti design on the toe box and heel counter of this pair gives you that stylish edge and sets you apart from the crowd. Upper Canvas upper with chamfered heel made of contrast graphic and puma logo Synthetic twill tape laces in dual tone looped around metallic eyelets Synthetic rubber toe box for extra durability and protection of the forefoot Canvas stylish side strips in contrast colour Midsole Comfort insole with canvas tongue to ensure a snug, comfortable Fit Textile lining for added comfort Outsole Made of high traction gum rubber Rubber toe guard strip with tonal sidewall trip Textured to suit the anatomy of the feet for maximum grip Reinforced heel with dip in back collar line to prevent Achilles tendon irritation
